description: Lightweight in-editor translation: select text, hover, or use the command palette. Supports OpenAI-compatible LLMs (OpenAI / Claude / DeepSeek / Kimi / Zhipu / Ollama / ...), DeepL, Youdao, and Baidu.
command.selection.title: Fine Translate: Translate Selection
command.toggleHover.title: Fine Translate: Toggle Hover Translation
command.setApiKey.title: Fine Translate: Set API Key…
command.clearApiKey.title: Fine Translate: Clear API Key…
command.clearCache.title: Fine Translate: Clear Cache
command.showUsagePanel.title: Fine Translate: Show Usage
command.resetStats.title: Fine Translate: Reset Statistics
command.switchProvider.title: Fine Translate: Switch Provider…
config.title: Fine Translate
config.activeProvider.markdownDescriptio: Active translation provider. For OpenAI-compatible LLMs the Base URL and Model are taken from the matching preset whenever the corresponding settings below are left blank. Run [`Fine Translate: Switch Provider…`](command:fine-translate.switchProvider) to switch provider and model in one step.
config.activeProvider.enum.openai: OpenAI-compatible (OpenAI / Claude / DeepSeek / Kimi / Zhipu / Ollama / ...)
config.openai.baseUrl.markdownDescriptio: **Base URL** for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The dropdown lists known presets — edit `settings.json` directly for a custom URL. Tip: run [`Fine Translate: Apply Provider Preset…`](command:fine-translate.applyProviderPreset) to fill URL + model in one step.
config.openai.model.markdownDescription: **Model** name for the OpenAI-compatible provider. The dropdown lists ~81 known models across 18 providers — edit `settings.json` directly for a custom model.
config.openai.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent to the LLM.
config.openai.apiKey.markdownDescription: **OpenAI-compatible API key.** ⚠️ Stored in `settings.json` and **synced via Settings Sync**. Prefer [storing it via SecretStorage](command:fine-translate.setApiKey) instead. SecretStorage takes precedence over this field.
config.deepl.useFreeApi.description: Use the DeepL Free API endpoint (otherwise Pro).
config.deepl.apiKey.markdownDescription: **DeepL API key.** ⚠️ Stored in `settings.json` and **synced via Settings Sync**. Prefer [storing it via SecretStorage](command:fine-translate.setApiKey) instead. SecretStorage takes precedence over this field.
config.baidu.appId.description: Baidu Translation App ID (set the secret via 'Fine Translate: Set API Key' command).
config.baidu.appSecret.markdownDescripti: **Baidu App Secret.** ⚠️ Stored in `settings.json` and **synced via Settings Sync**. Prefer [storing it via SecretStorage](command:fine-translate.setApiKey) instead. SecretStorage takes precedence over this field.
config.youdao.appKey.description: Youdao Translation App Key (set the app secret via 'Fine Translate: Set API Key' command).
config.youdao.appSecret.markdownDescript: **Youdao App Secret.** ⚠️ Stored in `settings.json` and **synced via Settings Sync**. Prefer [storing it via SecretStorage](command:fine-translate.setApiKey) instead. SecretStorage takes precedence over this field.
config.targetLanguage.description: Target language (BCP-47, e.g. 'zh-CN', 'en'). Empty means follow vscode.env.language.
config.hover.enabled.description: Enable hover translation. When on, the hover popup translates content from other providers near the cursor (e.g. GitLens commit info, type signatures, JSDoc). Off by default — every hover triggers a provider request.
config.hover.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for hover translation, in milliseconds.
config.hover.languages.description: Document languageIds where hover translation is enabled. ['*'] = all.
config.selection.autoOnSelect.descriptio: Translate the active selection when the mouse hovers over it. The hover popup appears only on hover — selection changes alone no longer trigger it.
config.cache.maxEntries.description: Maximum number of cached translation entries.
config.maxCharsPerRequest.description: Source text longer than this is rejected to avoid runaway cost.
config.telemetry.estimateCost.descriptio: Estimate USD cost in the usage panel based on built-in pricing tables.
